briefdescription.para: This function does a minimal test on the Spdif device and driver as a design example.

parameterdescription.para: is the Device ID of the Spdif Device and is the XPAR_<spdif_instance>_DEVICE_ID value from xparameters.h

briefdescription.para: This function does a minimal test on the Spdif device and driver as a design example.

detaileddescription.para: The purpose of this function is to illustrate how to use the Xspdif component. It initializes Spdif and then sets it up such that a interrupt is generated.
This function uses interrupt driven mode of the Spdif.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Interrupt Controller driver Instance
InstancePtr is a pointer to the Xspdif driver Instance
is the XPAR_<spdif_instance>_DEVICE_ID value from xparameters.h

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the Test is successful, otherwise XST_FAILURE
This function contains an infinite loop such that if interrupts are not working it may never return.

briefdescription.para: This function setups the interrupt system such that interrupts can occur for the Spdif.

detaileddescription.para: This function is application specific since the actual system may or may not have an interrupt controller. The Spdif could be directly connected to a processor without an interrupt controller. The user should modify this function to fit the application.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Interrupt Controller driver Instance.
is a pointer to the XSpdif driver Instance.
is the XPAR_<spdif_instance>_DEVICE_ID value from xparameters.h.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the Test is successful, otherwise XST_FAILURE.
This function contains an infinite loop such that if interrupts are not working it may never return.

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler which performs processing for the Spdif It is called from an interrupt context when the Spdif receives a start of block Interrupt.

detaileddescription.para: This handler provides an example of how to handle Spdif interrupts but is application specific.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the callback function

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler which performs processing for the Spdif It is called from an interrupt context when the Spdif receives a Preamble Error Interrupt.

detaileddescription.para: This handler provides an example of how to handle Spdif interrupts but is application specific.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the callback function

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler which performs processing for the Spdif It is called from an interrupt context when the Spdif receives a BMC error Interrupt.

detaileddescription.para: This handler provides an example of how to handle Spdif interrupts but is application specific.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the callback function

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler which performs processing for the Spdif It is called from an interrupt context when the Spdif receives a Transmitter or Receiver Fifo Empty Interrupt.

detaileddescription.para: This handler provides an example of how to handle Spdif interrupts but is application specific.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the callback function

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler which performs processing for the Spdif It is called from an interrupt context when the Spdif receives a Transmitter or Receiver Fifo Full Interrupt.

detaileddescription.para: This handler provides an example of how to handle Spdif interrupts but is application specific.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the callback function

briefdescription.para: This function is the main function of the Spdif example using Interrupts.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS to indicate success, else XST_FAILURE to indicate a Failure.
